name: Crushed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, cover the potatoes with water and season lightly with salt. Bring to a simmer.
2. Cook the potatoes until tender, about 10-15 minutes. Drain well.
3. Preheat the broiler.
4. Lightly spray a baking sheet with non-stick cooking spray.
5. Place one potato on a clean kitchen towel and fold the towel over it. Press down firmly to crush the potato lightly.
6. Transfer the crushed potato to the prepared baking sheet. Repeat with remaining potatoes.
7. Brush the tops of all the potatoes with oil.
8. Broil until the tops are browned and crusty, about 5-8 minutes.
9. Sprinkle with minced onion, chopped parsley, salt, and pepper before serving.
